title: tool.profile.list
description: List the supported processing-tool profiles, joined with Settings-owned executable paths and enabled flags. Used by the Settings → Tool Workflows section and by the project CTA to decide whether 'Open in {tool}' is enabled.

ToolProfile.description: Settings-joined view of a tool profile. Static fields come from crates/workflow/profiles/; mutable fields come from Settings.

name.description: Display name shown in Settings and in the CTA label.

configured.description: True when executable_path is set and non-blank in Settings.

available.description: True when configured AND the executable currently exists with execute permission. Filesystem read; debounce at the UI layer.

supports_open_folder.description: Whether the tool's args_template renders {folder}. The CTA still passes cwd when this is false.

enabled.description: User-controlled switch for hiding the tool from project CTAs without deleting the path.

auto_detected.description: True when the current executable_path came from R2 discovery and has not been explicitly saved by the user yet.

Request.description: List all known tool profiles. No filters in v1.
